scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && echo '\nAPK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
scripts.android:run: npm run android:install && adb shell am start -n com.duckhunt.controller/.MainActivity && adb logcat -c && adb logcat Capacitor:V Capacitor/Plugin:V '*:S'
